steps.title: Use the variability clue
steps.content: The sentence says wave power is not something because it "varies in unpredictable ways." The missing word must mean steady or reliable, since the problem is unpredictable variation.

steps.title: Test the word meanings
steps.content: Choice A means happening by chance, not steady. Choice C describes self-assurance, which cannot describe wave power. Choice D is about cost, while the passage discusses variability. The word that means steady over time fits the contrast with unpredictable variation. The answer is B.
